app.title: Multi Crop Diseases Detection and Nutritional Deficiency and Recommendation Using Machine Learning. (Agro Vision)
app.description: Multi Crop Diseases Detection and Nutritional Deficiency and Recommendation Using Machine Learning. (Agro Vision)
home.hero.title: Scan every leaf in your field.
home.hero.sub: Multi-crop disease detection, nutrition deficiency insight, and recommendations in one place.
home.hero.offline: Offline-ready and still useful when the network drops.
home.stats.title: What the system can support today
home.stats.classes.detail: Healthy, disease, and background detection are included.
home.stats.crops.detail: Coverage spans orchard, vegetable, and field crops.
home.stats.reports.detail: Every successful diagnosis stays available in history.
home.stats.districts.detail: Weather, trends, and market cards stay district-aware.
home.scan.title: Scan a leaf
home.scan.subtitle: Single leaf, steady hand, natural light.
home.scan.tip1: Use one clear leaf and keep the background simple.
home.scan.tip2: Capture in daylight to avoid glare, blur, and harsh shadows.
home.scan.tip3: Review the diagnosis, then save the report for follow-up action.
home.alert.title: Weather advisory
home.alert.action1: Prioritize scouting in humid blocks and vulnerable rows.
home.alert.action2: Record suspicious symptoms now so repeat scans are easier later.
home.weather.title: Weather & Risk
home.weather.location.fallback: Using saved district values until live location loads.
home.weather.status.denied: Location blocked. Showing saved dashboard values.
home.weather.status.unsupported: Browser location is unavailable here. Showing fallback values.
home.weather.status.error: Live weather could not be loaded right now.
home.market.title: Market rates
home.market.error: Could not load rates. Retrying soon...
home.market.source.title: Data source
home.market.source.live_title: Prices from the data.gov.in Agmarknet API
home.market.source.cached_title: Live API unreachable, showing saved reference prices
home.reports.title: Recent reports
home.forecast.title: 3-Day disease risk
home.forecast.subtitle: Localized weather and crop cues inform the forecast.
home.forecast.source.live: Live forecast from your machine location.
home.analytics.title: Local disease trends
home.analytics.subtitle: 12-month fungal, viral, and bacterial frequencies.
voice.hint: Say a disease name and hear a suggested remedy.
home.voice.fallback: Scan a leaf to get started.
scanner.intro: Use the camera or upload a leaf photo to begin.
scanner.title: Scan a leaf
scanner.hint: Tip: Focus on a single leaf with steady hands.
scanner.upload.hint: JPEG, PNG, or WEBP up to 2MB.
scanner.upload.size_error: File too large. Please upload an image under 2MB.
scanner.upload.type_error: Please choose an image file only.
scanner.preview.empty: Ready for a clear leaf photo
scanner.preview.caption: Use the camera or upload a sharp photo to continue.
scanner.file.label: Selected photo
scanner.file.meta.empty: JPEG, PNG, or WEBP up to 2MB.
scanner.actions.label: Choose how to add your photo
scanner.support.title: Scan support
scanner.support.subtitle: Increase the chance of a clean diagnosis.
scanner.support.tip1.title: One leaf, one frame
scanner.support.tip1.body: Avoid multiple leaves, hands, or soil clutter in the same image.
scanner.support.tip2.title: Use soft daylight
scanner.support.tip2.body: Natural light preserves lesions, spots, and discoloration better than flash.
scanner.support.tip3.title: Save useful scans
scanner.support.tip3.body: Strong scans become reports you can compare later from the history page.
scanner.support.coverage.detail: The current model covers multiple orchard, field, and vegetable crops.
scanner.support.privacy.detail: Images stay inside the app flow and the successful result is saved only as a report entry.
prediction.label: Diagnosis
prediction.confidence.note: Use the confidence score as a guide and re-scan if the photo was blurred, shadowed, or incomplete.
library.title: Disease library
library.heading: Explore crops and diseases
library.search.label: Search diseases
library.crop.label: Crop filter
library.summary.title: Reference library
library.summary.subtitle: Browse crop symptoms, causes, and treatment guidance in one place.
library.summary.items.detail: Search the same crop and disease labels used by the prediction pipeline.
library.summary.crops.detail: Use crop filtering first when you want faster matching.
library.summary.healthy.detail: Healthy samples help distinguish normal foliage from early symptoms.
history.title: My reports
history.heading: Track your scans
history.empty.filtered: No reports found for this filter.
history.summary.total.detail: Every confirmed diagnosis stays available for later review.
history.summary.high.detail: Use these reports to follow up on urgent disease pressure first.
history.summary.confidence.detail: Re-scan any report created from low-quality or partial leaf photos.
history.confirm_delete: Delete this report? This cannot be undone.
settings.title: Settings
settings.heading: Configure your experience
settings.language.hint: Choose the language for the app interface.
settings.theme.info: Switch between light and dark modes.
settings.data.info: Clear local preferences and cached data.
settings.help.answer1.detail: Use daylight, steady hands, and isolate a single leaf in the frame.
settings.help.answer2: Why might a prediction be wrong?
settings.help.answer2.detail: Blurry shots, overlapping leaves, or poor lighting may mislead the model.
tutorial.title: Capture a clean leaf photo
tutorial.detail4: Ensure the leaf fills the frame.
